description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux distro build that runs on every push. Use multiple ubuntu-latest jobs in different containers for various Linux distributions (Debian Bullseye, Fedora 37, OpenSUSE Leap, OpenSUSE Tumbleweed, ArchLinux, ArchLinux-Qt6, and WebAssembly), each with steps to install git, checkout code with submodules, install dependencies, and build the project. The WebAssembly job also includes deployment and push steps.
